name: Coverage: Assistant cancel with confirmation in docked chat
description: Create and cancel a uniquely named event entirely inside the docked AI chat (no calendar clicks) to avoid ambiguous FullCalendar anchors.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Open AI chat with Open AI chat or Control+K and wait 2 seconds
In the assistant input only (do not click the calendar), type Schedule TS Cancel Only tomorrow at 11:15am for 25 minutes and click Send
Wait up to 8 seconds, then click Create event inside the assistant panel
Wait 4 seconds for Applied successfully or Done in the assistant panel
Still inside the assistant input, type Cancel TS Cancel Only and click Send
Wait up to 6 seconds for a cancel confirmation card in the assistant panel
Verify the assistant panel shows Yes, cancel or cancel confirmation mentioning TS Cancel Only
Click Yes, cancel inside the assistant panel (not on the calendar)
Verify assistant shows Applied successfully, Done, Event cancelled, or similar success text for the cancel action
